observations.summary: Dan questions the value of accumulating material possessions that cannot be taken beyond death.

evidence.quote: "Abundance of things?" Dan spat, his voice cracking with brine. "Why devote my life to things I cannot carry into death?"

observations.notes: This reflects a core existential motif about the futility of materialism in the face of mortality.
